simpleDefinition: A small tool with two or more points used for picking up food

exampleThai: เธอกินสลัดด้วยส้อม

simpleDefinition: A tool used for cutting food
exampleSentence: I need a knife to cut this meat.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องการมีดเพื่อหั่นเนื้อนี้
imagePrompt: A kitchen knife on a wooden chopping board, realistic

simpleDefinition: A tool used for eating soup or stirring liquids
exampleSentence: He eats soup with a spoon.
exampleThai: เขากินซุปด้วยช้อน
imagePrompt: A shiny silver spoon on a napkin, clear lighting

simpleDefinition: A deep, round dish used for holding food or liquid
exampleSentence: There is a bowl of soup on the table.
exampleThai: มีซุปหนึ่งชามอยู่บนโต๊ะ
imagePrompt: A white ceramic bowl filled with hot soup, simple

simpleDefinition: A container used for drinking cold liquids
exampleSentence: Can I have a glass of water, please?
exampleThai: ขอรบกวนน้ำเปล่าหนึ่งแก้วได้ไหม?
imagePrompt: A tall clear glass filled with pure water, realistic

simpleDefinition: A deep metal container used for cooking food on a stove

imagePrompt: A metal cooking pot on a stove, modern kitchen

simpleDefinition: A flat metal container used for frying food
exampleSentence: I am frying an egg in the pan.
exampleThai: ฉันกำลังทอดไข่ในกระทะ
imagePrompt: A black frying pan on a white background, minimalist

thaiMeaning: อ่างล้างจาน
simpleDefinition: A bowl connected to a water pipe used for washing

simpleDefinition: A machine used for baking or roasting food
exampleSentence: The cake is baking in the oven.

simpleDefinition: A machine that keeps food and drinks cold

thaiMeaning: ผ้าเช็ดตัว

simpleDefinition: A substance used with water for washing and cleaning

simpleDefinition: A glass surface that reflects your image

simpleDefinition: An object with hair or plastic points used for tidying your hair

simpleDefinition: A flat piece of plastic or wood with teeth, used for tidying hair
